input.content:
Report the quantitative estimate of drug-likeness (QED) of this molecule.

Cc1ccc(C)c(OCC(=O)N2CCN(C(=O)[C@@H]3CCCO3)CC2)c1

Respond with a single floating point number, and put the answer in \boxed{...}.

Identify the number of valence electrons in total (including hydrogens) in the following compound.

C[C@@H]1O[C@@H](O[C@H]2[C@H](OC(=O)[C@]34CCC(C)(C)C[C@@]3(C)C3=CC[C@@H]5[C@@]6(C)C[C@H](O)[C@H](O[C@@H]7O[C@H](CO)[C@@H](O)[C@H](O)[C@H]7O)[C@@](C)(C(=O)O)[C@@H]6CC[C@@]5(C)[C@]3(CO)CC4)O[C@H](C)[C@H](O)[C@@H]2O)[C@H](O)[C@H](O)[C@H]1O[C@@H]1OC[C@@H](O)[C@H](O)[C@H]1O

Provide your reasoning for the answer and state the final result. Your final answer (and only the answer) must be enclosed in double parentheses. The final result should be a single integer.

Is this molecule compliant with Lipinski's Rule of Five (MW ≤ 500, HBD ≤ 5, HBA ≤ 10, logP ≤ 5)?

CC(c1ccccc1)c1cccc(=O)n1O

Respond with 0 or 1, and put the answer in \boxed{...}. (1 = yes/passes, 0 = no/fails)

Does the following molecule contain an amide group (C(=O)N)?

COc1ccc(-n2c(C)nc3cnc4cc(-c5cnccc5OC)c(OC)cc4c32)cc1

Provide your reasoning for the answer and state the final result. Your final answer (and only the answer) must be enclosed in double parentheses. The final result should be 0 or 1. (1 = yes/present, 0 = no/absent)

Determine the number of aliphatic carboxylic acids or carboxylates in the following SMILES.

CC[C@H](C)[C@H](NC(=O)[C@H](CS)NC(=O)[C@H](CC(=O)O)NC(=O)[C@@H]1CCCN1C(=O)[C@H](Cc1ccccc1)NC(=O)CNC(=O)[C@H](CC(=O)O)NC(=O)[C@H](CS)NC(=O)[C@H](CCCNC(=N)N)NC(=O)[C@H](Cc1c[nH]c2ccccc12)NC(=O)[C@H](CCC(=O)O)NC(=O)[C@H](CCSC)NC(=O)[C@@H]1CCCN1C(=O)[C@H](Cc1ccc(O)cc1)NC(=O)[C@H](CS)NC(=O)[C@H](Cc1cnc[nH]1)NC(=O)[C@@H]1CCCN1C(=O)[C@H](Cc1cnc[nH]1)NC(=O)[C@H](CCCCN)NC(=O)[C@H](CCCNC(=N)N)NC(=O)[C@H](CS)NC(=O)[C@H](CCC(N)=O)NC(=O)[C@H](Cc1ccccc1)NC(=O)[C@H](Cc1ccc(O)cc1)NC(=O)[C@H](CO)NC(=O)[C@H](C)NC(=O)[C@@H]1CCCN1C(=O)[C@@H](N)CS)C(=O)N[C@@H](CC(=O)O)C(=O)NCC(=O)N[C@@H](CO)C(=O)N[C@@H](CC(=O)O)C(=O)N[C@@H](CCC(=O)O)C(=O)N[C@@H](CCC(=O)O)C(=O)N[C@@H](CCCNC(=N)N)C(=O)N[C@@H](CS)C(=O)NCC(=O)NCC(=O)NCC(=O)NCC(=O)O

Provide your reasoning for the answer and state the final result. Your final answer (and only the answer) must be enclosed in double parentheses. The final result should be a single integer.

Compute the molecular weight (in g/mol, using average atomic masses) for this compound.

CC[C@H](C)[C@@H]1NC(=O)[C@H](C)NC(=O)[C@H]([C@@H](C)O)NC(=O)[C@H]([C@@H](C)CC)NC(=O)[C@H]([C@@H](C)O)NC(=O)[C@@H]2CSSC[C@H]3NC(=O)[C@H](C(C)C)NC(=O)[C@H](CCCNC(=N)N)NC(=O)[C@H](CC(=O)O)NC(=O)[C@H](CCCNC(=N)N)NC(=O)[C@@H]4CSSC[C@H](NC(=O)[C@H](CO)NC(=O)[C@H](CCC(=O)O)NC(=O)[C@H](C)NC(=O)[C@H](CSSC[C@H](NC(=O)CNC(=O)[C@H](CC(C)C)NC1=O)C(=O)N[C@@H](CO)C(=O)N4)NC(=O)[C@@H]1CCCN1C(=O)[C@H](CC(C)C)NC(=O)CNC(=O)[C@H](CC(=O)O)NC(=O)[C@H](Cc1ccc(O)cc1)NC3=O)C(=O)N[C@@H](C(C)C)C(=O)N[C@@H](Cc1ccccc1)C(=O)N[C@@H]([C@@H](C)CC)C(=O)N1CCC[C@H]1C(=O)N2

Provide your reasoning for the answer and state the final result. Your final answer (and only the answer) must be enclosed in double parentheses. The final result should be a single floating point number.

tools.name: stateful_python_code_exec
